Package com.pallycon.widevinelibrary

Class PallyconDrmSession

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pallycon.widevinelibrary.PallyconDrmSession
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    com.google.android.exoplayer2.drm.DrmSession
    @RequiresApi(18)
public class PallyconDrmSession
extends java.lang.Object
implements com.google.android.exoplayer2.drm.DrmSession

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      static interface  PallyconDrmSession.ProvisioningManager
      Manages provisioning requests.
      static interface  PallyconDrmSession.ReferenceCountListener
      Callback to be notified when the reference count of this session changes.
      static class  PallyconDrmSession.UnexpectedDrmSessionException
      Thrown when an unexpected exception or error is thrown during provisioning or key requests.

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface com.google.android.exoplayer2.drm.DrmSession

    • Field Detail

      • schemeDatas

        @Nullable
public final java.util.List<com.google.android.exoplayer2.drm.DrmInitData.SchemeData> schemeDatas
        The DRM scheme datas, or null if this session uses offline keys.

    • Constructor Detail

      • PallyconDrmSession

        public PallyconDrmSession​(java.util.UUID uuid,
                          com.google.android.exoplayer2.drm.ExoMediaDrm mediaDrm,
                          PallyconDrmSession.ProvisioningManager provisioningManager,
                          PallyconDrmSession.ReferenceCountListener referenceCountListener,
                          @Nullable
                          java.util.List<com.google.android.exoplayer2.drm.DrmInitData.SchemeData> schemeDatas,
                          @Mode
                          int mode,
                          boolean playClearSamplesWithoutKeys,
                          boolean isPlaceholderSession,
                          @Nullable
                          byte[] offlineLicenseKeySetId,
                          java.util.HashMap<java.lang.String,​java.lang.String> keyRequestParameters,
                          com.google.android.exoplayer2.drm.MediaDrmCallback callback,
                          android.os.Looper playbackLooper,
                          com.google.android.exoplayer2.upstream.LoadErrorHandlingPolicy loadErrorHandlingPolicy,
                          android.content.Context context,
                          android.net.Uri uri,
                          java.lang.String cid,
                          java.lang.String siteId,
                          android.os.Handler eventHandler,
                          PallyconEventListener eventListener)
        Instantiates a new DRM session.
        Parameters:
        uuid - The UUID of the drm scheme.
        mediaDrm - The media DRM.
        provisioningManager - The manager for provisioning.
        referenceCountListener - The PallyconDrmSession.ReferenceCountListener.
        schemeDatas - DRM scheme datas for this session, or null if an offlineLicenseKeySetId is provided or if isPlaceholderSession is true.
        mode - The DRM mode. Ignored if isPlaceholderSession is true.
        isPlaceholderSession - Whether this session is not expected to acquire any keys.
        offlineLicenseKeySetId - The offline license key set identifier, or null when not using offline keys.
        keyRequestParameters - Key request parameters.
        callback - The media DRM callback.
        playbackLooper - The playback looper.
        loadErrorHandlingPolicy - The LoadErrorHandlingPolicy for key and provisioning requests.
